title: The Update Log #3 - Radiolab Follow-Ups (Jul 2026)
description: Update Log #3 - seven Radiolab threads you flagged, chased to 2026 and fact-checked. Father K (Khader El-Yateem), the pastor who lost a City Council race and rose to lead a national church; Match Made in Marrow - the magician Jim Munroe, the atheist donor who saved him, and the belief divide they kept; Super Cool - supercooling becoming a real organ-preservation technology, and the frozen-horses story that was never true; Stereothreat - a famous finding that mostly didn't survive the replication crisis it saw coming; Birthstory - the surrogacy law repealed out from under the episode's own premise; Unraveling Bolero - the science finally quantifying dementia-unlocked creativity; and Infective Heredity - gene-swapping, antibiotic resistance, and how Darwin's tree bent but held. First officer, out.
